changes.value:
## What

Implement `get_code_actions` — available fixes and refactors for a code range. Goes beyond Claude Code's LSP tool. Turns the LSP into a refactoring engine.

### `get_code_actions` — `textDocument/codeAction` (+ optional `codeAction/resolve`)
- New file: `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/get_code_actions.rs`
- Takes `LspContext` + `GetCodeActionsOptions { file_path, start_line, start_character, end_line, end_character, filter_kind }`
- Sends `textDocument/codeAction` with the range and optional `only` kinds filter
- For actions that have no inline edits, optionally sends `codeAction/resolve` to get full edits
- Returns structured list of available actions with their edits

### Result types
```rust
pub struct CodeActionsResult {
    pub actions: Vec<CodeAction>,
}
pub struct CodeAction {
    pub title: String,
    pub kind: Option<String>,        // \"quickfix\", \"refactor\", \"source\", etc.
    pub edits: Option<Vec<FileEdit>>,  // resolved edits, reuse from get_rename_edits
    pub is_preferred: bool,
}
```

### Files to create/modify
- `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/get_code_actions.rs` — new
- `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/mod.rs` — re-export
- `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/lib.rs` — re-export
- `swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/code_context/mod.rs` — registration + handler

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Returns available code actions for a range
- [ ] `filter_kind` limits results to specific kinds (quickfix, refactor, source)
- [ ] Resolved edits included when available
- [ ] `is_preferred` flag correctly parsed from LSP response
- [ ] Appears as MCP operation under `code_context` tool

## Tests
- [ ] Unit test: codeAction response parsing (Command vs CodeAction variants)
- [ ] Unit test: filter_kind filtering logic
- [ ] Unit test: WorkspaceEdit extraction from resolved code actions
- [ ] Unit test: `is_preferred` field parsing
- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-code-context` passes

## Workflow
- Use `/tdd` — write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.

#lsp-live

+++ modified
@@ -1,15 +1,14 @@
 ## What

-Implement `get_code_actions` — available fixes and refactors for a code range. Goes beyond Claude Code's LSP tool. Turns the LSP into a refactoring engine.
+Implement `get_code_actions` — available fixes and refactors for a code range. **Live LSP only** — no index fallback. Goes beyond Claude Code's LSP tool.

-### `get_code_actions` — `textDocument/codeAction` (+ optional `codeAction/resolve`)
+### `get_code_actions` — live LSP only
 - New file: `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/get_code_actions.rs`
-- Takes `LspContext` + `GetCodeActionsOptions { file_path, start_line, start_character, end_line, end_character, filter_kind }`
-- Sends `textDocument/codeAction` with the range and optional `only` kinds filter
-- For actions that have no inline edits, optionally sends `codeAction/resolve` to get full edits
-- Returns structured list of available actions with their edits
+- Takes `LayeredContext` + `GetCodeActionsOptions { file_path, start_line, start_character, end_line, end_character, filter_kind }`
+- **Layer 1 (live LSP)**: `textDocument/codeAction` with range and optional `only` kinds filter. Optionally `codeAction/resolve` for actions without inline edits.
+- **No index fallback**: Code actions require live semantic analysis. Return empty + notice when no live LSP.

-### Result types
+### Result types (reuses shared `FileEdit` from INFRA)
 ```rust
 pub struct CodeActionsResult {
     pub actions: Vec<CodeAction>,
@@ -16,8 +15,8 @@

     pub title: String,
-    pub kind: Option<String>,        // \"quickfix\", \"refactor\", \"source\", etc.
-    pub edits: Option<Vec<FileEdit>>,  // resolved edits, reuse from get_rename_edits
+    pub kind: Option<String>,
+    pub edits: Option<Vec<FileEdit>>,
     pub is_preferred: bool,
 }
 ```

 - `swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/code_context/mod.rs` — registration + handler

 ## Acceptance Criteria

 - [ ] Resolved edits included when available
-- [ ] `is_preferred` flag correctly parsed from LSP response
+- [ ] Returns empty + notice (not error) when no live LSP
 - [ ] Appears as MCP operation under `code_context` tool

 ## Tests

 - [ ] Unit test: filter_kind filtering logic
 - [ ] Unit test: WorkspaceEdit extraction from resolved code actions
-- [ ] Unit test: `is_preferred` field parsing
+- [ ] Unit test: empty result when no live LSP
 - [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-code-context` passes

@@ -1,12 +1,12 @@
 ## What

-Implement `get_code_actions` — available fixes and refactors for a code range. **Live LSP only** — no index fallback. Goes beyond Claude Code's LSP tool.
+Implement `get_code_actions` — available fixes and refactors. **Live LSP only**. All access through `LayeredContext`. Goes beyond Claude Code's LSP tool.

 ### `get_code_actions` — live LSP only
 - New file: `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/get_code_actions.rs`
-- Takes `LayeredContext` + `GetCodeActionsOptions { file_path, start_line, start_character, end_line, end_character, filter_kind }`
-- **Layer 1 (live LSP)**: `textDocument/codeAction` with range and optional `only` kinds filter. Optionally `codeAction/resolve` for actions without inline edits.
-- **No index fallback**: Code actions require live semantic analysis. Return empty + notice when no live LSP.
+- Takes `&LayeredContext` + `GetCodeActionsOptions { file_path, start_line, start_character, end_line, end_character, filter_kind }`
+- **Layer 1 only**: `ctx.lsp_request("textDocument/codeAction", ...)` with range and optional `only` filter. Optionally `ctx.lsp_request("codeAction/resolve", ...)` for actions without inline edits.
+- **No index fallback**: Code actions require live analysis. Returns empty when `!ctx.has_live_lsp()`.

 ### Result types (reuses shared `FileEdit` from INFRA)
 ```rust
@@ -28,11 +28,10 @@
 - `swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/code_context/mod.rs` — registration + handler

 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] Returns available code actions when live LSP running
-- [ ] `filter_kind` limits results to specific kinds (quickfix, refactor, source)
-- [ ] Resolved edits included when available
-- [ ] Returns empty + notice (not error) when no live LSP
-- [ ] Appears as MCP operation under `code_context` tool
+- [ ] Returns code actions via `ctx.lsp_request()` when live LSP available
+- [ ] `filter_kind` limits to specific kinds (quickfix, refactor, source)
+- [ ] Resolved edits via `ctx.lsp_request("codeAction/resolve", ...)` when available
+- [ ] Returns empty (not error) when `!ctx.has_live_lsp()`
